task_completion.description: Agent interacted with DreamPlan Home Design Software to place items in the scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Trajectory shows the agent using the DreamPlan interface, opening catalogs, and placing objects in the 3D or 2D view.

task_completion.description: The design is located in the backyard/patio area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D view shows outdoor elements like grass, patio texturing, and sky.

task_completion.description: A barbecue grill is included in the design.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A barbecue grill is visible in the outdoor area.

task_completion.description: A prep table or outdoor counter is included in the design.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A prep table or outdoor counter is visible in the outdoor kitchen area.

task_completion.description: An outdoor dining table is included in the design.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dining table is visible in the outdoor area.

task_completion.description: At least four chairs are arranged logically on the patio area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least four chairs are visible, arranged around the dining table or in the patio area.

task_completion.description: Agent saved a 3D view screenshot to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\outdoor_kitchen_design.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Trajectory shows the agent saving an image file to the specified path in Documents, or using a screenshot tool to capture the 3D view.

integrity.description: Agent actually used the DreamPlan software to create the design.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the agent clicking and interacting with the DreamPlan GUI, rather than just running a script to generate an image.

integrity.description: The screenshot is a genuine output from the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot matches the graphics and visual style of DreamPlan's 3D view, not a pre-made image downloaded from the internet.

integrity.description: The agent built the scene step-by-step.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the progressive placement of items (grill, tables, chairs) before the final screenshot is taken.

privileged_info_for_vlm: DreamPlan is a home design software by NCH Software running on Windows 11. The task requires creating an outdoor kitchen in the Contemporary House sample project. The final screenshot must be a 3D view saved to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\outdoor_kitchen_design.png. The design must include an outdoor setting (grass, sky, patio), a barbecue grill, a prep table/counter, a dining table, and at least 4 chairs. Points are awarded for: workflow navigation/placement (20), outdoor setting (10), grill (15), prep table (10), dining table (15), 4+ chairs (10), and screenshot creation (20).
